transcript: Speaker A (Vendor Woman): I think the prices will go up next week. Speaker B (Vendor Man 1): Yeah, demand is increasing these days. Speaker C (Vendor Man 2): Then we should stock more in advance. Speaker D (Customer): Yeh log English mein baat kar rahe hain! Bhaiya, aap log itni fluent English kaise bol lete ho? [These people are talking in English! How do you speak such fluent English?] Speaker A: Practice karte hain bas. [We just practice.] Speaker D: Sirf practice se? Main bhi toh practice karta hoon. Har interview mein English na bolne ki wajah se hi mera rejection ho jata hai. [Just practice? I also practice. I get rejected in every interview because I can't speak English.] Speaker A: Kyunki aap sahi jagah practice nahi kar rahe ho. [Because you aren't practicing in the right place.] Speaker D: Matlab? [Meaning?] Speaker B: SpeakX use karo. Wahan roz English bolke practice kar sakte ho aur agar kuch galat bhi bol diya na, toh bhi tension nahi. [Use SpeakX. You can practice speaking English daily, and no worries if you make mistakes.] Speaker C: AI teacher hai, woh turant correct kar deti hai. [There is an AI teacher who corrects you instantly.] Speaker A: Haan, din ho ya raat, hamesha AI teacher available rehti hai. Daily 15 minutes practice hi kaafi hai. [Yes, day or night, the AI teacher is always available. Just 15 minutes of daily practice is enough.] Speaker D: Matlab background matter nahi karta? [So background doesn't matter?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi, sirf practice matter karta hai. [Not at all, only practice matters.] Speaker C: Aur khaali interview mein baat karna hi nahi, aur bhi kai real-life situations practice kar sakte ho. [And not just interviews, you can practice many real-life situations.] Speaker B: Toh aaj hi download karo SpeakX app aur trial leke apna English speaking improve karo. [So download SpeakX today, take a trial, and improve your English.] Speaker E (Voiceover): Download the SpeakX app now. Start your free trial today.
on_screen_text: I think the prices up next week. Yeah, demand is increasing these days. Then we should stock more in advance. Yeh log English mein baat kar rahe hain! Bhaiya aap log itni fluent English kaise bol lete ho? Practice karte hain bas. Sirf practice se? Main bhi toh practice karta hoon. Har interview mein English ki wajah se hi mera rejection ho jata hai. Kyunki aap sahi jagah practice nahin kar rahe ho. Matlab? SpeakX use karo. Wahan roz English bolkar practice kar sakte ho aur agar kuch galat bhi bol diya na toh bhi tension nahi. Milein SIA se Aapki personal AI teacher [Meet SIA, your personal AI teacher]. Haan, din ho ya raat hamesha AI teacher available rehti hai. Daily 15 minutes practice hi kaafi hai. Matlab background matter nahi karta? Bilkul nahi. Sirf practice matter karta hai. Aur khaali interview mein baat karna hi nahi, aur bhi kai real life situations practice kar sakte ho. Toh aaj hi download karo SpeakX app aur trial leke apna English speaking improve karo. Download on the App Store. Get it on Google Play.
summary: A customer is shocked to hear vegetable vendors speaking fluent English and laments his own job interview rejections due to poor language skills. The vendors recommend the SpeakX app, showcasing its 24/7 AI teacher and real-life practice scenarios. The ad concludes with a call to download the app and start a free trial.
